docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,654.00 FILED BY OLK-CARDONA, GABRIELLA N AS TO DEFENDANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TIM WANG & DANIEL WANG PROPERTY MANAGERS FILED BY DEFENDANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF GABRIELLA N OLK-CARDONA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL WANG, PROPERTY MANAGER. OTHER APPEARANCES DEFENDANT WITNESS: TIM WANG, PROPERTY MANAGER PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-28-26 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 303
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC MAILED TO RESPONDENT OLK-CARDONA, GABRIELLA N
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLK-CARDONA, GABRIELLA N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC $2,654.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,754.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2754.00(INCLUDING COSTS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2026 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2026 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON MAY-28-2026 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303, JUDGE RICHARD DARWIN. (D206)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2026 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED AND MODIFIED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-13-2026 IS MODIFIED. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE RICHARD C. DARWIN; CLERK: ROSA PONCE; PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 09:43:46 A.M., PAUSED AT 10:28:02 A.M., RECONVENED AT 10:36:13 A.M., AND CONCLUDED AT 10:39:43 A.M. (D303)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT OLK-CARDONA, GABRIELLA N RECOVER FROM APPELLANT 7 TWIN PEAKS LLC $1,177.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,277.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
